data.title: Blockworks Acquires Messari, Combining the Two Largest Crypto Data Platforms
data.description: Blockworks, a prominent crypto data platform, has recently completed the acquisition of Messari, a key player in the crypto data and market intelligence sector. This strategic move brings together two major information entities in the industry. The acquisition follows Blockworks' recent Series A extension, which valued the company at $192 million. The decision to raise funds was aimed at addressing the fragmented nature of the crypto data and information market. Messari, having dedicated eight years to develop its resources, was a valuable addition to Blockworks' portfolio.

data.title: Amgen Seeks FDA Hearing To Challenge Proposed Tavneos Withdrawal
data.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ: AMGN) has officially requested a hearing to contest the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's proposal to revoke approval for Tavneos (avacopan). The company, along with its subsidiary ChemoCentryx, Inc., argues that despite the FDA's concerns, the benefits of the drug still outweigh the risks for patients with a rare autoimmune disease. This request comes in response to a Notice of Opportunity for a Hearing issued by the FDA's Center for Drug Evaluation and Research (CDER) on April 30 regarding Tavneos. Amgen plans to provide detailed data, analyses, and supporting information by June 29, 2026, to support their case.

data.title: Bankman-Fried's appeal to overturn 25-year prison sentence rejected. Clemency bid from Trump unlikely.
data.description: The conviction of the ex-FTX CEO was recently affirmed by a federal appeals court. Despite seeking clemency from President Trump, the chances of it being granted seem slim due to political circumstances.

data.title: SpaceX fuels tokenization boom as Kraken launches SpaceX IPO xStocks; prediction markets rise amid crypto volatility. SBF requests Trump pardon.
data.description: Despite the fluctuating prices in the crypto market, the value of tokenized Real World Assets (RWAs) has seen a significant increase. Kraken has recently launched xStocks, a platform for trading SpaceX IPO stocks. Prediction markets have shown higher growth rates compared to on-chain gambling activities. Notably, entrepreneur Sam Bankman-Fried has publicly expressed his interest in obtaining a pardon from former President Donald Trump.

data.title: Exodus and Ondo initiate tokenized stock platform; 200+ onchain equities included amidst rising popularity of tokenized equities.
data.description: As the demand for tokenized equities rises, crypto exchanges and wallets are quickly working to provide onchain access to stocks and pre-IPO companies.

data.title: IMLS-Sponsored Freedom 250 Trucks Visited 23 States, Hosting Over 100,000 Visitors
data.description: Since March 2026, the Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS) has been showcasing traveling exhibits across the United States as part of the 250 Celebration of America. These exhibits focus on positive lessons about America's founding. The initiative has reached far corners of the US, with a significant impact on audiences nationwide. The exhibits are aimed at educating and engaging the public, highlighting key aspects of the nation's history and principles.

data.title: Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse Expands West Coast Footprint Through Select Grocery Outlet Locations
data.description: Dallas-based brand Rancher’s Premium Smokehouse is capitalizing on the summer season by expanding onto Grocery Outlet shelves in Washington, California, Oregon, and Pennsylvania. The fastest-growing sausage brand in the U.S. has garnered thousands of five-star reviews for its unique flavor combinations. The expansion will make their products available in select Grocery Outlet locations, fueling the brand’s retail momentum.

data.title: Rutgers Business School ranks among top MBA programs in the U.S. for return on investment
data.description: In a recent study conducted by Bloomberg Businessweek, Rutgers MBA graduates experienced a median annualized return on investment of 16% after 10 years. The 10-year net ROI stood at $679,000. This data showcases the financial success of Rutgers Business School alumni over the years. The findings were part of Bloomberg Businessweek's annual Business School ROI Calculator. The results were particularly notable given the challenging economic landscape. The study underscores the value and quality of education provided by Rutgers Business School's Full-Time MBA program. The report was released from Newark, New Jersey on June 12, 2026, demonstrating the lasting impact and benefit of pursuing an MBA at Rutgers.

data.title: Relativity Acquires Gavel to Extend its AI Platform for Legal Data Intelligence into Microsoft Word
data.description: In a recent development, it was announced that Relativity has successfully completed the acquisition of Gavel, an innovative legal technology company primarily known for its AI-based solutions. Gavel's advanced technology is widely utilized by numerous legal professionals, aiding them in tasks such as drafting, reviewing, and automating legal work products. The acquisition is significant as it brings onboard a large user base of legal professionals who benefit from Gavel's offerings. This move by Relativity aims to enhance their existing platforms, including RelativityOne and Relativity aiR, by integrating Gavel's technology. This collaboration is expected to streamline and improve the process of creating work products through the combined expertise and resources of both entities.

data.title: Precipio is requesting Shareholders/Brokers vote today to avoid costly adjournment and rescheduling of Annual Shareholders Meeting
data.description: On June 12, 2026, the management of Precipio, Inc., a specialty cancer diagnostics company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PRPO, urged shareholders to direct their brokers to vote their shares promptly. The deadline for votes to be included in the Annual Meeting is 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on June 14, 2026. It is crucial for shareholders to ensure their votes are recorded to participate in the decision-making process.

data.title: Cuervo Tequila is Now the Official Sponsor of Your Summer Fridays
data.description: In Jersey City, New Jersey, Cuervo® Tequila, the top-selling tequila globally, is intervening to rescue Summer Fridays from a common enemy: the 4 p.m. Friday meeting. Until Labor Day, Cuervo is proclaiming Summer Fridays as a compulsory celebration, urging margarita enthusiasts to shut down their work, kickstart the weekend early, and Maintain the Cuervo spirit all season. To support individuals in regaining their Friday afternoons, Cuervo is initiating the Summer Fridays HQ at ww.

data.title: Zenity Extends AI Agent Security and Governance to Claude Enterprise
data.description: Zenity, based in New York, recently revealed a significant development during the AI Agent Security Summit. The company shared news of its latest integration with Claude's Compliance API. This integration aims to provide enhanced governance and security measures for businesses utilizing Claude Enterprise. Through this collaboration, organizations can benefit from a more robust framework to ensure compliance and safeguard sensitive data.

data.title: Forbes Declares Elon Musk as the World’s First Trillionaire
data.description: In recent news, Elon Musk was announced by Forbes as the world's first trillionaire on Friday. The trading of SpaceX's stock on the Nasdaq began at $150 per share, resulting in a market capitalization of almost $2 trillion for the company. Forbes has calculated that this IPO has increased Musk's fortune to $1.1 trillion as of Friday morning. Musk's net worth witnessed a boost of $188 billion, reaching an estimated $982 billion on Thursday evening, when the IPO was priced at $135 per share. Examining Musk's wealth portfolio, he serves as the chairman of SpaceX.

data.title: IQM Appoints Barbara Venneman, Vanguard Board Director and Former Global Head of Deloitte Digital, to its Board of Directors
data.description: IQM Quantum Computers, based in Espoo, Finland, has recently appointed Barbara Venneman to its Board of Directors. Venneman brings valuable experience in digital transformation, enterprise technology commercialization, and global business scaling to the board. This move comes as IQM looks to broaden its commercial presence globally. Furthermore, Jan Goetz, the CEO and Co-founder of IQM, will take over as the Founder representative on the board, replacing Co-founder Juha Vartiainen. IQM is known as a leader in superconducting quantum computers and is aiming to expand its reach in the industry.
